cards.issuer: United Nations Human Rights, Special Rapporteur on trafficking in persons
cards.title: Implementation of the non-punishment principle, A/HRC/47/34
cards.jurisdictionOrScope: International human-rights guidance; local legal verification required
cards.exactReviewedPassage: not punished for unlawful acts committed as a consequence of trafficking
cards.allowedUse: Human-rights framing for non-punishment review, the relationship between exploitation and unlawful acts, and cooperation-invariance safeguards
cards.limitation: It is not universal domestic law and cannot establish individual eligibility

cards.issuer: United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime
cards.title: Principle of non-criminalization of victims
cards.jurisdictionOrScope: International education guidance; local legal verification required
cards.exactReviewedPassage: trafficking victims are treated not as victims but as criminals
cards.locator: Module 8, Key Issues, principle section, para. after Box 24
cards.allowedUse: Design prompts for practitioner review and reinforce that a person should not be reduced to alleged offending
cards.limitation: Does not determine non-punishment under a specific jurisdiction

cards.title: A Human Rights-Based Approach to Data
cards.jurisdictionOrScope: Human-rights data guidance; local legal verification required
cards.exactReviewedPassage: Participation is central to a human rights-based approach.
cards.allowedUse: Data minimization, participation, privacy, transparency, accountability, and do-no-harm framing
cards.limitation: Principles do not by themselves prove legal compliance or technical security

cards.title: ILO Indicators of Forced Labour
cards.jurisdictionOrScope: Operational indicators; local legal verification required
cards.exactReviewedPassage: not exhaustive but serve as a flexible, evolving tool
cards.allowedUse: Build transparent review categories for possible control, coercion, dependency, and forced labour
cards.limitation: Indicators support further assessment; they are not a model label, score, automatic determination, or substitute for legal review

cards.issuer: Organization for Security and Co-operation in Europe
cards.title: Model Standard Operating Procedures for Identification and Protection of Victims of Trafficking for the Purpose of Forced Criminality
cards.jurisdictionOrScope: Model forced-criminality procedures; local legal verification required
cards.exactReviewedPassage: identify, protect, and support victims of trafficking
cards.locator: Model SOP PDF, Purpose of Guidance, p. 8
cards.allowedUse: Known, unknown, conflicting, and overlooked-information workflow; identification and protection safeguards; practitioner review concepts
cards.limitation: Model procedures require local adaptation and do not establish that a person is a victim

cards.title: LLM01 Prompt Injection
cards.jurisdictionOrScope: Application-security guidance; local legal verification required
cards.exactReviewedPassage: Separate and clearly denote untrusted content
cards.locator: LLM01:2025 Prompt Injection, Prevention and Mitigation Strategies, item 6
cards.allowedUse: Untrusted-document boundary, indirect prompt-injection tests, input and output handling, and least-capability design
cards.limitation: Guidance does not guarantee prevention; version and recommendations must be rechecked before public release
